purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.text: This contract defines how every Stage 2 and Stage 3 close-out preserves execution source, verification evidence, and unresolved follow-up.

provenance_rules.title: Provenance Rules
items: every close-out must name one execution source
`closed` must not imply that all capability was daemon-owned
mixed execution must describe which part stayed manual

follow_up_rules.title: Follow-Up Rules
items: missing judge, rule, or regression work must be surfaced as deferred follow-up rather than omitted
unresolved risk must stay visible in the close-out payload
rejected or blocked work still needs close-out provenance

approval_rules.title: Approval Rules
items: close-out may not erase the approval history that allowed the action
terminal takeover may not be represented as daemon-owned for convenience
